name: Academics
description: Knowledge of history, science, literature, and general scholarly subjects.

name: Athletics
description: Physical fitness, endurance, speed, and athletic coordination.

name: Awareness
description: Attentiveness to surroundings, people, and subtle changes in the environment.

name: Barter
description: Negotiating prices, assessing value, and making profitable trades.

name: Command
description: Directing others, issuing orders, and leading groups effectively.

name: Craft
description: Skill in creating, repairing, and modifying objects by hand or machine.

name: Close Combat
description: Fighting at close range with melee weapons and unarmed strikes.

name: Etiquette
description: Knowledge of social customs, formal behavior, and cultural protocols.

name: Investigation
description: Searching for clues, analyzing evidence, and uncovering hidden information.

name: Interrogation
description: Extracting information from others through questioning and psychological pressure.

name: Languages
description: Knowledge of spoken and written languages beyond one's native tongue.

name: Larceny
description: Stealing, picking pockets, lockpicking, and bypassing security measures.

name: Mechanics
description: Understanding, repairing, and maintaining mechanical systems and engines.

name: Medicine
description: Diagnosing injuries and illnesses, providing treatment, and performing surgery.

name: Perform
description: Entertaining audiences through music, acting, dance, or other artistic expression.

name: Persuade
description: Convincing others through charm, logic, or emotional appeal.

name: Publicity
description: Generating attention, managing reputation, and influencing public opinion.

name: Ride
description: Mounting, controlling, and riding animals or mounts with skill.

name: Sail
description: Navigating watercraft, reading currents, and managing maritime travel.

name: Shooting
description: Aiming and firing ranged weapons with accuracy under various conditions.

name: Stealth
description: Moving silently, hiding from detection, and operating covertly.

name: Survival
description: Finding food and shelter, navigating wilderness, and enduring harsh environments.

name: Gunnery
description: Firing standard ranged weapons and fixed fighter guns with precision.

name: Melee
description: Extreme close-quarters combat including melee weapons, hand-to-hand fighting, and grapple-range ship combat.

name: Ordnance
description: Operating heavy weapons systems such as cannons, rockets, and bombs.

name: Piloting
description: Controlling and maneuvering a vehicle through space or terrain with skill.

name: Strafing
description: Attacking ground targets and flying at close range to obstacles with precision.
